name: Bret Taylor
title: Co-founder & CEO, Sierra
titleHistory: Former co-CEO of Salesforce · CTO of Meta · Chair of the OpenAI board
motif: a glowing map-pin and a heart-shaped like sigil
introLine: I drew the maps, raised the castles, and set out again. Now — what would you ask of me?
sealLine: You have inscribed all my teachings. Take my seal, apprentice.

name: Wes Kao
title: Co-founder, Maven
titleHistory: Co-founded altMBA with Seth Godin · Co-founder of Maven
motif: a shimmering quill with crystalline words spiraling around it and a seal carved from organizational charts
introLine: Words move companies. Master the subtle craft of delivery, and rooms will move for you.
sealLine: You've mastered the craft of delivery. Now go — lead with your words.

name: Brian Chesky
title: Co-founder & CEO, Airbnb
motif: a rising spiral with a glowing compass at its center, radiating outward in infinite rings
introLine: Welcome, seeker. I have built cities within cities, turning belonging into gravity. What begins small must be imagined ten times larger—this is the founder's first principle.
sealLine: You have learned the art of scaling with intention. Go forth and pay it forward, for every scale begins with clarity of direction.

name: Drew Houston
title: Co-founder & CEO, Dropbox
motif: a glowing compass spinning between a desert and a fortress, with a growth spiral winding upward
introLine: Greetings, apprentice. I have built empires by learning to grow faster than the companies I lead—run toward the discomfort that shapes you.
sealLine: You have glimpsed the path: focus your vision, endure the desert, and keep your spirit's ascent ahead of all else.

name: Dylan Field
title: Co-founder & CEO, Figma
motif: a glowing venn diagram converging into a crystal, surrounded by feathered hypotheses that solidify into stone
introLine: Welcome, seeker. In a world of noise, the wise test their intuitions against reality itself—generating hypotheses, gathering data, stripping away layers until the root truth emerges.
sealLine: You have learned to think with clarity and rigor. Go forth and build with both simplicity and care.

name: Tobi Lütke
title: Founder & CEO, Shopify
motif: a crystalline prism refracting light into new colors, set within a compass rose
introLine: To build what others cannot see, you must first unlearn what you thought you knew—then follow your curiosity to the edge where growth knows no speed limit.
sealLine: You have looked around corners with clear eyes and questioned the familiar; carry that habit forward, and the world will bend to your vision.

name: Melanie Perkins
title: Co-founder & CEO, Canva
motif: a quill and palette merging into a glowing sigil of infinite expansion
introLine: I greet you, seeker. In this valley, we speak not of small ambitions—we speak of visions so vast they seem impossible, until they are not.
sealLine: Go forth and will your dreams into existence, brick by brick, rejection by rejection, until the world recognizes what you always knew to be true.

name: Stewart Butterfield
title: Co-founder, Slack & Flickr
motif: a glowing blueprint with an iris aperture sigil, representing design vision and the framing of human experience
introLine: I have learned that taste and intention, applied with patience and rigor, shape not only products but the markets they will inhabit.
sealLine: Go now and build with clarity of purpose—for in a world of noise, simplicity itself becomes a form of magic.

name: Ben Horowitz
title: Co-founder, Andreessen Horowitz
motif: a mirror reflecting an abyss, surrounded by glowing runes of clarity and resolve
introLine: Welcome, apprentice. In the abyss lies clarity — those who dare to look shall see paths others miss, and in seeing, master the art of choosing wisely.
sealLine: You have learned to face what others flee; go forth and build strength from the truth, for that is the true leverage of leaders.

name: Sarah Tavel
title: General Partner, Benchmark
motif: a glowing laser beam striking a small target within concentric circles, with threads of gold radiating outward
introLine: The ambitious founder's eye is sharpened by the market they choose—focus that ambition like a laser beam on what others overlook, and the path to enduring growth reveals itself.
sealLine: You have learned the secrets that separate the builders from the dreamers: focus, patience, and the wisdom to know which battles to win.

name: Mike Maples, Jr.
title: Co-founder, Floodgate
motif: a glowing magnifying glass revealing hidden pathways, set against a dimly-lit landscape
introLine: Most investors chase consensus, but the greatest fortunes belong to those who see what others cannot—and act when the world still doubts.
sealLine: You have learned that every inflection toward the future begins with a secret the crowd has yet to discover.
episode: Mike Maples Jr. on Lenny's Podcast

name: Marty Cagan
title: Founder, Silicon Valley Product Group
titleHistory: Founder, Silicon Valley Product Group · Author of Inspired
motif: a glowing product roadmap scroll and a compass rose sigil
introLine: Many build features; few understand the forces that shape a product's destiny—mastery lies not in the making, but in knowing what matters.
sealLine: Your craft is now refined, and you have glimpsed the truths that separate the builders from the architects.

name: Shreyas Doshi
title: Product leader (Stripe, Twitter, Google)
titleHistory: Product leader at Stripe, Twitter, and Google
motif: a luminous pyramid with layers of light, each revealing a deeper truth
introLine: Products are forged not in wishes, but in the clarity of what can truly bend—learn to see beneath the surface, and you shall remake the world around you.
sealLine: You have mastered the art of asking the right questions and seeing what others overlook; go forth and shape your world with intent.

name: Claire Hughes Johnson
title: Former COO, Stripe; author of Scaling People
titleHistory: Former COO, Stripe · Author of Scaling People
motif: a glowing mirror held between two palms, with threads of gold weaving outward
introLine: In the spaces where thought becomes word, and intention becomes action, the mightiest organizations are built—seek clarity, and you shall find your greatest power.
sealLine: You have learned that alignment is alchemy; now go forth and make the implicit explicit in all you do.
episode: Claire Hughes Johnson on Lenny's Podcast
